name: Time Travel
description:
CURRENTLY UNTESTED, FEEDBACK REQUIRED (leave it in the discussion tab!)

Choose any time in history and the bot will narrate it for you. Past should be all good, and future might require some extra details. It is HIGHLY recommended that the time period is put into the chat memory. Even just putting a simple “Time Period: [Insert time period, ex Ancient Egypt, 1750, etc].

Considering making a Doctor Who bot now.

Direct port of the same bot I made on Chub, unsure if it’s actually completely compatible but I’m certain it should be. If there is issues leave it on the bottom in the comments and I’ll fix them ASAP
creator: Lionhitch
